name: Zibo Qixiang Tengda Chemical Co., Ltd
summary: Zibo Qixiang Tengda Chemical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and markets various chemical products in China. Its products include methyl ethyl ketone, isobutylene, maleic anhydride, disproportioated products, butadiene rubber, and carboxyl styrene butadiene latex, as well as tert-butanol and MTBE products. The company also exports its products to the United States, Japan, Canada, South Korea, and India. The company is based in Zibo, China.
